description: Migrate the vanilla JS webview to Vite 7 + React 19 + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS v4 + Shadcn UI with 100% feature parity

userStories.title: Bootstrap Vite 7 project with React + TypeScript
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a properly configured Vite project so I can start building React components.
acceptanceCriteria: webview-app/ directory created with Vite 7 + React 19 + TypeScript template
pnpm install completes successfully in webview-app/
pnpm dev starts Vite dev server without errors

userStories.title: Configure Tailwind CSS v4 with Vite
userStories.description: As a developer, I need Tailwind CSS configured so I can use utility-first styling.
acceptanceCriteria: Tailwind CSS v4 installed with Vite plugin
tailwind.config.ts configured with content paths for src/**/*.{ts,tsx}
Test class (e.g., text-red-500) renders correctly in browser

userStories.title: Configure Vite for VS Code webview context
userStories.description: As a developer, I need Vite output compatible with VS Code webview restrictions (CSP, nonce, inline assets).
acceptanceCriteria: build.modulePreload: false set to simplify loading
Assets inlined or properly hashed for single-file compatibility
Base path configured for webview.asWebviewUri() handling
Build produces valid HTML + JS bundle in out/webview/

userStories.title: Configure Vite dev server with HMR for development
userStories.description: As a developer, I need HMR (Hot Module Replacement) during development to speed up iteration without full reloads.
acceptanceCriteria: Vite dev server configured with HMR enabled
Dev server accessible from VS Code webview context
CSS changes reflect immediately without page reload
React component changes hot-reload preserving state

userStories.title: Install and configure Shadcn UI
userStories.description: As a developer, I need Shadcn UI configured so I can use accessible, pre-built components.
acceptanceCriteria: Shadcn UI installed and initialized with components.json
Default theme configured to match VS Code CSS variables

userStories.title: Map VS Code CSS variables to Tailwind theme
userStories.description: As a developer, I need VS Code colors available in Tailwind so the webview matches editor theming.
acceptanceCriteria: --vscode-* CSS variables preserved in Tailwind config
Custom colors defined: vscode-foreground, vscode-background, vscode-panel-background, etc.
Theme tokens usable as bg-vscode-background, text-vscode-foreground

userStories.title: Create App.tsx main layout component
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the main 3-panel layout as a React component.
acceptanceCriteria: App.tsx renders 3-panel layout: left (palette), center (canvas), right (properties)

userStories.title: Create Palette.tsx component
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a React component for the component palette (left panel).
acceptanceCriteria: Palette.tsx renders list of draggable components (JPanel, JButton, JLabel, JTextField, etc.)
Each component item shows icon and name
Drag initiation works (drag data set correctly)
Styling matches VS Code panel aesthetic

userStories.title: Create Canvas.tsx component with drag-drop
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a React canvas component that accepts dropped components.
acceptanceCriteria: Drop zone highlights when dragging over
Dropped components appear at drop coordinates
Canvas handles zoom and pan state
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create CanvasComponent.tsx with resize handles
userStories.description: As a developer, I need individual canvas components with resize functionality.
acceptanceCriteria: CanvasComponent.tsx renders component with position and dimensions
Selection state shows resize handles on all corners/edges
Drag resize handles updates component dimensions
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create PropertiesPanel.tsx component
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a properties editor panel as a React component.
acceptanceCriteria: Text inputs update properties (text, font, bounds)
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create Toolbar.tsx component
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a toolbar with action buttons as a React component.
acceptanceCriteria: Toolbar.tsx renders action buttons (undo, redo, delete, generate)

userStories.title: Create useCanvasState hook
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a React hook for managing canvas component state.

userStories.title: Create useUndoRedo hook
userStories.description: As a developer, I need undo/redo functionality as a React hook.
acceptanceCriteria: canUndo and canRedo boolean flags exposed

userStories.title: Create usePostMessage hook for extension communication
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a hook to communicate with the VS Code extension.
acceptanceCriteria: postMessage() function typed with message interface

userStories.title: Create useExtensionListener hook
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a hook to receive messages from the extension.

userStories.title: Install Zod for runtime validation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need Zod installed so I can define schemas for runtime type validation.
acceptanceCriteria: Import z from zod works without errors

userStories.title: Define Zod schemas for canvas components
userStories.description: As a developer, I need Zod schemas to validate canvas state at runtime and prevent invalid data.
acceptanceCriteria: BoundsSchema: x, y, width, height (all numbers, min constraints)
ComponentPropertiesSchema: text, font, background, foreground (optional strings)
CanvasStateSchema: components array, selectedId (nullable), zoom, pan
Export inferred types: type CanvasComponent = z.infer<typeof CanvasComponentSchema>

userStories.title: Define Zod schemas for extension messages
userStories.description: As a developer, I need schemas for all postMessage communication to ensure type safety.
acceptanceCriteria: MessageSchema created as discriminated union by type field

userStories.title: Parse all extension messages with Zod
userStories.description: As a developer, I need all incoming messages validated before use to prevent runtime errors.
acceptanceCriteria: Invalid messages logged with error details, not crashing app
Valid messages typed correctly via schema inference
Unknown message types handled gracefully (ignored with warning)

userStories.title: Parse all user inputs in properties panel
userStories.description: As a developer, I need all property inputs validated to prevent invalid state updates.
acceptanceCriteria: Numeric inputs (x, y, width, height) parsed and clamped to valid ranges
Color inputs validated as hex format (#RRGGBB or #RGB)
Empty/invalid inputs show visual feedback but don't crash
safeParse() used to handle validation errors gracefully

userStories.title: Create type guards and parsing utilities
userStories.description: As a developer, I need utility functions for common parsing operations.
acceptanceCriteria: All utilities use Zod safeParse and log errors on failure

userStories.title: Migrate all event handlers to React patterns
userStories.description: As a developer, I need all main.js event handlers converted to React.
acceptanceCriteria: No direct DOM event listeners (use React onEvent props)
useEffect used for lifecycle and cleanup
useCallback for memoized handlers where needed
No memory leaks on component unmount

userStories.title: Convert style.css to Tailwind utilities
userStories.description: As a developer, I need all custom CSS converted to Tailwind classes.
acceptanceCriteria: style.css converted to Tailwind utilities in components
Custom utilities added for canvas-specific styles (handles, selection)
No inline styles (use Tailwind classes or CSS variables)

userStories.title: Update CanvasPanel.ts to load Vite bundle
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the extension to load the new React bundle.
acceptanceCriteria: Nonce injected into bundled script tags
CSP updated to allow React bundle scripts

userStories.title: Update package.json build scripts
userStories.description: As a developer, I need build scripts updated to include webview build.
acceptanceCriteria: build:webview script added: cd webview-app && pnpm build
Build order correct (webview first, then extension)

userStories.title: Update CSP for nonce-compatible output
userStories.description: As a developer, I need Content Security Policy updated for React bundle.
acceptanceCriteria: Inline styles handled (nonce or Tailwind approach)

userStories.title: Verify production build and packaging
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the extension to package correctly with webview assets.

userStories.title: Functional verification - drag and drop
userStories.description: As a user, I want to drag components from palette to canvas so I can build my UI.
acceptanceCriteria: Drop on canvas adds component at cursor position
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Functional verification - resize components
userStories.description: As a user, I want to resize components on canvas so I can adjust their dimensions.
acceptanceCriteria: Drag corner handles resizes both width/height
Drag edge handles resizes one dimension
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Functional verification - zoom and pan
userStories.description: As a user, I want to zoom (Ctrl+scroll) and pan (middle-click drag) the canvas.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Functional verification - undo/redo
userStories.description: As a user, I want to undo (Ctrl+Z) and redo (Ctrl+Y) my actions.
acceptanceCriteria: History depth reasonable (limit prevents memory issues)
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Functional verification - properties panel
userStories.description: As a user, I want to edit component properties and see changes immediately.
acceptanceCriteria: Editing text updates canvas in real-time
Bounds inputs reflect and update position/size
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Functional verification - Java generation
userStories.description: As a user, I want to generate Java code from my canvas design.
acceptanceCriteria: Generated Java code matches canvas state

userStories.title: Remove old webview/ folder
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the old webview removed to complete migration.
acceptanceCriteria: No references to old webview in codebase

userStories.title: Update documentation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need updated docs for React + Vite development workflow.
acceptanceCriteria: README updated with webview development instructions
